note: Added 3 new tests for random/arbitrary handle values: random_handle_values_return_invalid_handle_error (1000 pseudo-random values), extreme_random_values_do_not_crash (edge-case values like 0xDEADBEEF), concurrent_random_handle_validation_no_crash_or_ub (8 threads). Updated docs with ASan instructions. All 48 tests pass.
